creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 216773
update to 1.15.2

New upstream version 1.15.2:
- Massive internal rewrite, some improvements and small bugfixes
- Muxer updated to the latest matroska specification
- Advanced usage changes:
  * Sdftool included as standalone executable
  * Drive speed control option

Fixes/improvements in the port:
- Avoid double definition of LINUXTRIPLET
- Fix no-op `ldconfig` replacement
- Brandelf makemkvcon as "Linux"
- Avoid "automagic" dependency on isl
- Update statically linked ffmpeg to 4.3.1

Build tested successfully on {12.1,13}-amd64 and {11.3,12.1}-i386, other testbuilds still running

Functionality tested on 12.1-amd64

If you don't use a paid license key but the freely available "beta key", you are forced to upgrade eventually. This might be a reason for an MFH? I'm still trying to find out when exactly it will happen:
https://www.makemkv.com/forum/viewtopic.php?f=3&t=22706
